name: KiCad AI Copilot
description: Convert natural language electronics requirements into KiCad PCB designs. Automatically generates components, nets, footprints, decoupling caps, RF rules, and PCB placement constraints.
description_full: KiCad AI Copilot is an EDA design assistant that converts natural language product requirements into fully structured KiCad 10+ compatible designs. Features include: automatic support circuitry (decoupling capacitors, pull-up resistors, reset circuits, programming headers), RF antenna matching networks, USB-C CC resistors, battery protection diodes, I2C bus pull-ups, PCB placement rules, and BOM generation for JLCPCB/LCSC.
